channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Legal challenges loom as abortion is enshrined in Arizona's constitution
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Arizona top officials certified the state’s election results Monday, including voters' approval of a measure that expands abortion access from 15 weeks to the point of fetal viability.
item.dc:creator: SEJAL GOVINDARAO AND GABRIEL SANDOVAL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: DNC union launches GoFundMe to help former staffers hit by massive layoffs after election losses
item.description: The union representing DNC staff launched a GoFundMe to raise money for those who were abruptly laid off last week – as some described the cuts as a "betrayal" of party values.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Osprey ferrying White House staff in New York grounded due to safety issue, witness reports flames
item.description: An Osprey flying as part of the presidential squadron used to ferry White House staff and government officials from an event in New York Monday was grounded due to a safety concern, with one witness reporting flames under the right engine.
item.dc:creator: Tara Copp, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Supreme Court won’t hear challenge to graphic cigarette warning labels
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court won’t hear a challenge to a federal requirement that cigarette packages and advertising include graphic images demonstrating the effects of smoking. The high court declined to hear the case in a brief written order handed down Monday. Tobacco company R.J.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Denver mayor says he’s prepared to go to jail over opposition to Trump deportations of illegal immigrants
item.description: Denver Mayor Mike Johnston says he is prepared to got to jail over the opposition to the mass deportation plan to be launched by President-elect Trump.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump planning to lift Biden's LNG pause, increase oil drilling during 1st days in office: report
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump reportedly plans to "go strong" on overturning President Biden's climate policies, such as lifting a pause on LNG exports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GOP senators squirm over sex-related allegations against Trump Cabinet picks
item.description: Republican senators are squirming over the rash of sexual misconduct allegations against President-elect Donald Trump's Cabinet picks, which they fear will become a focal point of Senate confirmation hearings next year.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Florida health official advises communities to stop adding fluoride to drinking water
item.description: Florida’s surgeon general, Dr. Joseph Ladapo, cited developmental concerns from higher levels of fluoride than are found in most U.S. water supplies.
item.dc:creator: Stephanie Colombini, MPR News

item.title: Governor Gavin Newsom will stop in Kern County during 'California Jobs First' tour
item.description: BAKERSFIELD, Calif. (KGET) -- On Monday, the governor of California will be in Kern County talking with local leaders and workers.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Eyraud, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump’s deportation vow alarms Texas construction industry
item.description: Texas builders warn mass deportations of undocumented migrants could devastate the construction industry, threatening housing and infrastructure work in one of the nation’s fastest-growing states.
item.dc:creator: Julian Aguilar, MPR News

item.title: Trump rounds out health team with CDC, FDA picks
item.description: President-elect Trump rounded out his health team for his upcoming White House term with a flurry of Friday announcements.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Trump expected to name investor Scott Bessent as Treasury secretary pick
item.description: Bessent, founder and CEO of hedge fund Key Square Group, served as an economic adviser to the Trump campaign, often appearing on financial talk shows to argue in favor of the president-elect's economic policies.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, WFLA, NBC

item.title: How NYC congestion pricing tolls could impact drivers
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – New York Gov. Kathy Hochul recently introduced a new plan to toll drivers who enter Manhattan below 60th Street. The revised congestion pricing plan would cost most drivers $9 during peak hours and $2.25 during off-peak hours. It's expected to go into effect in January.
item.dc:creator: Dan Mannarino, PIX 11

item.title: Florida officials allege 'pervasive' discrimination against Trump supporters at FEMA
item.description: Florida Attorney General Ashley Moody and U.S. Rep. Vern Buchanan will hold a news conference Friday "to discuss their efforts to uncover evidence of political discrimination at FEMA and demand accountability," according to a release from Buchanan's office.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: SEC Chair Gary Gensler, who took aim at crypto industry, to step down in January
item.description: Gensler said he would step down on Jan. 20, when Donald Trump will inaugurated as the next president. Gensler took big enforcement actions against the crypto industry.
item.dc:creator: Maria Aspan, MPR News

item.title: Trump chooses Pam Bondi for attorney general pick after Gaetz withdraws
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump on Thursday named Pam Bondi, the former attorney general of Florida, to be U.S. attorney general just hours after his other choice, Matt Gaetz, withdrew his name.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Report: Minnesota Lottery needs to tighten up how it regulates retailers
item.description: Minnesota’s Office of the Legislative Auditor reports that the Minnesota State Lottery generally complies with requirements, but has room to improve when it comes to how it manages retailers.
item.dc:creator: Anika Besst, MPR News

item.title: Florist gets death threats after refusing to serve Trump voters
item.description: The owner posted on social media that the business is now temporarily closed after receiving several death threats. She also made all of her social media accounts private.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Knox, Fox 5

item.title: Listen: New York Times reporter Reid Epstein on Ken Martin’s bid for DNC chair
item.description: Reid Epstein, a reporter with The New York Times, spoke with Martin, who argued Democrats’ downfall was their message failing to land with voters ahead of the 2024 election.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Wurzer and Gracie Stockton, MPR News

item.title: Donald Trump to nominate Dr. Oz for Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump plans to nominate former Pennsylvania Senate nominee Dr. Mehmet Oz to serve as the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) Administrator.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, Fox 5

item.title: Manhattan DA opposes Trump’s bid to dismiss hush money conviction
item.description: Manhattan prosecutors on Tuesday said they will oppose President-elect Trump’s demand to dismiss his New York criminal conviction following the election, instead floating the idea the judge could freeze the case until Trump leaves office.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, Fox 5

item.title: Speaker Johnson becomes 'MAGA' Mike, cementing place in Trump's circle
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) is cementing his place in President-elect Trump’s inner orbit, becoming not only a visible — if slightly out-of-place-looking — part of his entourage, but a key supporter of his no-holds-barred approach to his second term.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, WGN 9
